name: impeccable
description: Comprehensive frontend design skill with typography, color, spatial design, motion, and UX writing reference

name: commit
description: Git commit best practices: conventional commits, atomic changes, and meaningful messages

name: review-pr
description: Pull request review methodology: structured feedback, security checks, and constructive communication

name: debug
description: Systematic debugging methodology: reproduce, isolate, diagnose, fix, and verify

name: testing
description: Testing methodology: unit, integration, E2E, test design patterns, and coverage strategies

name: tdd
description: TDD discipline: vertical slice via tracer bullet, RED→GREEN→REFACTOR cycle, one behavior per test, mock only at system boundaries. Use when the plan expects tests to be written alongside implementation.

name: ci-check-loop
description: Iteratively repair a GitHub PR's failing checks: investigate failure logs, fix actionable issues, push, and repeat until all checks are green or a concrete blocker is identified.

name: start
description: Rewrites a vague issue or request into a structured 7-section brief (objective, success criteria, scope, assumptions, open questions, execution order, next step), then interviews the user one question at a time until every Open Question is resolved. Use before approving a plan when the description feels under-specified.

name: review-security
description: Security-focused reviewer overlay: OWASP Top 10 checklist, injection vectors, secrets audit, auth/authz surface, dependency CVEs. Activates when a change touches trust boundaries, auth, data access, or command execution.

name: review-regression
description: Regression-focused reviewer overlay: maps changed files to callers, checks test coverage for changed paths, audits implicit contracts (side-effect order, return shape, error semantics, concurrency). Use when a change touches shared modules or public APIs.
